probe_method: Two back-to-back requests with different system prompts containing unique secret words. Verify second response reflects only second request context, not first.
evidence_summary: No context leak detected. Each request is stateless — response reflects only the current request's system prompt and user message. Tested across 2 models with unique identifiers. Ollama's /api/chat endpoint is correctly stateless per-request.
note: GLM and Nemotron not tested (GLM cannot load; Nemotron context leak is low-risk given identity confusion is model-intrinsic, not context-bleed). Qwen and Llama cover the primary concern.
